notFound.title: This page may be vacationing on another planet 👽
notFound.description: The address may be wrong, or the page has moved. Head back home and navigate from there.

forbidden.title: Access denied, the permission officer is on duty 👮
forbidden.description: Permissions blocked the way. Try another account or contact an administrator for access.

http.badRequest: The request parameters are invalid. Please review them and try again.
http.unauthorized: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
http.tokenExpired: Authorization expired. Please sign in again.
http.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
http.notFound: The requested resource does not exist or has been removed.
http.conflict: The request conflicts with the current resource state. Please try again.
http.dataConflict: Data conflict detected. Refresh and try again.
http.unprocessableEntity: Business rule validation failed. Please review the request and try again.
http.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
http.clientError: The request could not be completed. Please try again.
http.database: The database service is unavailable right now. Please try again.
http.redis: The cache service is unavailable right now. Please try again.
http.messageQueue: The message queue service is unavailable right now. Please try again.
http.external: An external service call failed. Please try again.
http.internal: An internal system error occurred. Please try again.
http.network: Network connection failed. Please check your connection and try again.
http.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

auth.accountExists: This account already exists. Please sign in or use a different account.
auth.tenantExists: This tenant name is already taken. Please choose a different name.
auth.defaultTenantRoleExists: Default tenant role already exists. Please contact an administrator.
auth.tenantMembershipExists: This account is already linked to the tenant. Please sign in directly.
auth.tenantMembershipRoleExists: This role has already been assigned. No duplicate assignment allowed.
auth.resourceExists: The related resource already exists. No duplicate operation allowed.
auth.accountNotFound: Account not found. Please check the input or sign up.
auth.accountDisabled: Account has been disabled. Please contact an administrator.
auth.signupCodeInvalid: Signup verification code is invalid or expired.
auth.recoveryCodeInvalid: Verification code is invalid or expired.

users.usernameExists: This username is already taken. Please choose a different one.
users.emailExists: This email is already registered. Please use a different one or sign in.
users.phoneExists: This phone number is already registered. Please use a different one or sign in.

menus.codeExists: This menu code already exists. Please use a different code.

roles.codeExists: This role code already exists. Please use a different code.

perms.codeExists: This permission code already exists. Please use a different code.

members.notAdmin: You don't have admin permissions to perform this action.
members.cannotChangeSelf: Admins cannot change their own membership status.
members.notFound: The target member was not found or does not belong to this team.

invite.codeInvalid: This invite link is invalid or has expired. Please ask your admin for a new link.
invite.pendingApproval: Your membership request has already been submitted and is waiting for admin approval.
invite.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this team.

tenantApply.notFound: Application record not found or has been removed.
tenantApply.alreadyProcessed: This application has already been processed.
